$comment: SQLite MCP server for inspecting the dev database (accounts, profiles, realms, server
state) directly while building Server-Platform work, instead of writing throwaway query
code. PREREQUISITE: install 'uv' (https://docs.astral.sh/uv/ — `pip install uv` or the
platform installer); `uvx` then fetches mcp-server-sqlite on first run. (npm is avoided
here due to this machine's TLS issue; uv sidesteps it.)
DB PATH: points at the location the Host writes by default (connstring 'Data Source=
blackice.db', relative to the run dir). The path below matches a Release run; adjust if
you run Debug or from a different cwd. The file is gitignored, so it only exists after
the server has run at least once.
Activates only when Claude is launched from this repo directory.
